title: Modern Transparent [UI]
description: Modern, should be a transparent era...
body:
![is banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc058d391bf301abed28b2d8f9dc27fd07d129eb_0.webp)

Of course, this is just a simple Transparency UI,Minecraft 1.21 supports transparent ui (we don't guarantee that it can be used in previous versions. If you can, we suggest you pay attention to the description page. If the adaptation is completed, it will be told that the adaptation is completed or the corresponding module needs to be)

![This is the version supported by this resource bundle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f811529a3b35c0e910e26dca7fc4df40e5c389fb.png)
(Only Support 1.21-1.21.10)

(WT*?You ambition that too ...)

Although I can't promise... Some don't even need to be made, because the particularly old version doesn't have ui at all, so you can treat it as a joke before implementation

<details>
<summary>You need to attention!!!</summary>

~~Some renderers~~(all) on your phone cannot load this resource pack

Even though it's a computer, if you have a problem with your kernel, you can't load it



</details>
